name: Daily wiki update
prompt: Scan for new outputs across PP + client workspaces in last 24h. Anything tagged win/case-study/framework/template gets summarised + linked into ../knowledge/wiki/. Run wiki-build at the end.

name: Monday case study candidates
prompt: Read each client's shared-ledger.jsonl for the past 7 days. Find any documented win (revenue lift, CVR jump, positive review velocity, etc). Draft a case study (anonymised). Save to ../outputs/case-studies/.

name: Sunday IP audit
prompt: Track which frameworks/templates were referenced in proposals + content this week. Identify gaps (frameworks mentioned but never documented). Surface in Director Mon review.
